core_mechanism: constrained variational maximization of a mutual-information (entropy-difference) functional over a probability density subject to a fixed second-moment (variance) constraint, solved via a periodization / Poisson-summation identity on the convolved output density that turns the problem into a Fourier-analytic one
brief_reason: The abstract frames the result as a mutual-information maximization over input densities subject to a second-moment constraint and states the key step is a periodization identity for the (noise-convolved) output density enabling Fourier-analytic techniques.
